segments.text: Son of man, prophesy against Gog and say:
I am against you, Gog, chief prince of Meshek and Tubal.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will turn you around and drag you along. I will bring you from the far north and send you against the mountains of Israel.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Then I will strike your bow from your left hand and make your arrows drop from your right hand.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: On the mountains of Israel you will fall, you and all your troops and the nations with you. I will give you as food to all kinds of carrion birds and to the wild animals.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: You will fall in the open field, for I have spoken.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will send fire on Magog and on those who live in safety in the coastlands, and they will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will make known my holy name among my people Israel. I will no longer let my holy name be profaned, and the nations will know that I the Lord am the Holy One in Israel.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: It is coming! It will surely take place,
This is the day I have spoken of.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Then those who live in the towns of Israel will go out and use the weapons for fuel and burn them up—the small and large shields, the bows and arrows, the war clubs and spears. For seven years they will use them for fuel.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: They will not need to gather wood from the fields or cut it from the forests, because they will use the weapons for fuel. And they will plunder those who plundered them and loot those who looted them.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: On that day I will give Gog a burial place in Israel, in the valley of those who travel east of the Sea. It will block the way of travelers, because Gog and all his hordes will be buried there. So it will be called the Valley of Hamon Gog.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: For seven months the Israelites will be burying them in order to cleanse the land.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: All the people of the land will bury them, and the day I display my glory will be a memorable day for them.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: People will be continually employed in cleansing the land. They will spread out across the land and, along with others, they will bury any bodies that are lying on the ground. After the seven months they will carry out a more detailed search.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: As they go through the land, anyone who sees a human bone will leave a marker beside it until the gravediggers bury it in the Valley of Hamon Gog,
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: near a town called Hamonah. And so they will cleanse the land.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Son of man, this is what the Sovereign Lord says:

Call out to every kind of bird and all the wild animals: Assemble and come together from all around to the sacrifice I am preparing for you, the great sacrifice on the mountains of Israel. There you will eat flesh and drink blood.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: You will eat the flesh of mighty men and drink the blood of the princes of the earth as if they were rams and lambs, goats and bulls—all of them fattened animals from Bashan.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: At the sacrifice I am preparing for you, you will eat fat till you are glutted and drink blood till you are drunk.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: At my table you will eat your fill of horses and riders, mighty men and soldiers of every kind.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will display my glory among the nations, and all the nations will see the punishment I inflict and the hand I lay on them.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: From that day forward the people of Israel will know that I am the Lord their God.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: And the nations will know that the people of Israel went into exile for their sin, because they were unfaithful to me. So I hid my face from them and handed them over to their enemies, and they all fell by the sword.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I dealt with them according to their uncleanness and their offenses, and I hid my face from them.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will now restore the fortunes of Jacob and will have compassion on all the people of Israel, and I will be zealous for my holy name.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: They will forget their shame and all the unfaithfulness they showed toward me when they lived in safety in their land with no one to make them afraid.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: When I have brought them back from the nations and have gathered them from the countries of their enemies, I will be proved holy through them in the sight of many nations.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: Then they will know that I am the Lord their God, for though I sent them into exile among the nations, I will gather them to their own land, not leaving any behind.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord

segments.text: I will no longer hide my face from them, for I will pour out my Spirit on the people of Israel.
segments.speaker: Sovereign Lord
